input_format: line1: nums (JSON array of ints); line2: indexDiff (int); line3: valueDiff (int)

testcases.desc: Edge: example1 small with exact match
Edge: n=2 minimum size, no dup
Edge: valueDiff exactly at boundary (diff=2e9 > 1e9 = false)
Standard: strictly decreasing, value diff 1 always works
Standard: large values requires long arithmetic
Stress: large n near max boundary
